metadata.analyst: Shri Deepak Mehta, Forensic Surveillance Unit, ACB

content:
CCTV footage from the Bhopal Municipal Corporation parking lot (Camera ID: BMC-P1) was analyzed for the date of 15th March 2022.

Vikram Singh’s vehicle (Maruti Swift, registration MP-09-AB-5678) entered the parking lot at 11:03:12 AM and exited at 11:18:45 AM.

Mr. Rajiv Sharma’s attendance log confirms he was present in Mandatory Departmental Meeting Room 3 from 10:45:00 AM to 11:30:00 AM. The meeting was attended by 12 officers and recorded in the official register.

No visual evidence shows Mr. Sharma exiting the building between 10:45 AM and 11:30 AM. The CCTV angle does not capture the exact spot where Ms. Mehta claims the transaction occurred, but the timing and location are incompatible with her testimony.

Conclusion: It is physically impossible for Mr. Sharma to have received a cash envelope from Vikram Singh at 11:10 AM on 15th March 2022, as he was in a mandatory meeting at the time. Ms. Mehta’s sighting is inconsistent with verified surveillance and attendance records.
